'''ngohakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberless|rubberless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberless|rubberless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngohakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohakithi|ngohakithi]] || [[word:ngohakiji|ngohakiji]] || [[word:ngohakishi|ngohakishi]] || [[word:ngohakiki|ngohakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohakuthuthu|ngohakuthuthu]] || [[word:ngohakujuju|ngohakujuju]] || [[word:ngohakushushu|ngohakushushu]] || [[word:ngohakukuku|ngohakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohakuthu|ngohakuthu]] || [[word:ngohakuju|ngohakuju]] || [[word:ngohakushu|ngohakushu]] || [[word:ngohakuku|ngohakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohakufthuf|ngohakufthuf]] || [[word:ngohakufjuf|ngohakufjuf]] || [[word:ngohakufshuf|ngohakufshuf]] || [[word:ngohakufkuf|ngohakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohakethe|ngohakethe]] || [[word:ngohakeje|ngohakeje]] || [[word:ngohakeshe|ngohakeshe]] || [[word:ngohakeke|ngohakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohakothotho|ngohakothotho]] || [[word:ngohakojojo|ngohakojojo]] || [[word:ngohakoshosho|ngohakoshosho]] || [[word:ngohakokoko|ngohakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohakotho|ngohakotho]] || [[word:ngohakojo|ngohakojo]] || [[word:ngohakosho|ngohakosho]] || [[word:ngohakoko|ngohakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohakofthof|ngohakofthof]] || [[word:ngohakofjof|ngohakofjof]] || [[word:ngohakofshof|ngohakofshof]] || [[word:ngohakofkof|ngohakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohakïfthïf|ngohakïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfjïf|ngohakïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfshïf|ngohakïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfkïf|ngohakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohakïfthïfthïf|ngohakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfjïfjïf|ngohakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfshïfshïf|ngohakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfkïfkïf|ngohakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohakïfthïf|ngohakïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfjïf|ngohakïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfshïf|ngohakïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfkïf|ngohakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohakïfthïf|ngohakïfthïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfjïf|ngohakïfjïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfshïf|ngohakïfshïf]] || [[word:ngohakïfkïf|ngohakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohakæthæ|ngohakæthæ]] || [[word:ngohakæjæ|ngohakæjæ]] || [[word:ngohakæshæ|ngohakæshæ]] || [[word:ngohakækæ|ngohakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohakathatha|ngohakathatha]] || [[word:ngohakajaja|ngohakajaja]] || [[word:ngohakashasha|ngohakashasha]] || [[word:ngohakakaka|ngohakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohakatha|ngohakatha]] || [[word:ngohakaja|ngohakaja]] || [[word:ngohakasha|ngohakasha]] || [[word:ngohakaka|ngohakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohakafthaf|ngohakafthaf]] || [[word:ngohakafjaf|ngohakafjaf]] || [[word:ngohakafshaf|ngohakafshaf]] || [[word:ngohakafkaf|ngohakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngohakasha|ngohakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohakshësha|ngohakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohakrosha|ngohakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohakmusha|ngohakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohakyasha|ngohakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohaknkshësha|gongohaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohaknkrosha|gongohaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohaknkmusha|gongohaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohaknkyasha|gongohaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngohahakasha|ngohahakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohahakshësha|ngohahakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohahakrosha|ngohahakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohahakmusha|ngohahakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohahakyasha|ngohahakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohahaknkshësha|gongohahaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohahaknkrosha|gongohahaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohahaknkmusha|gongohahaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohahaknkyasha|gongohahaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngehækasha|ngehækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngehækshësha|ngehækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngehækrosha|ngehækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngehækmusha|ngehækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngehækyasha|ngehækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongehæknkshësha|gongehæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongehæknkrosha|gongehæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongehæknkmusha|gongehæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongehæknkyasha|gongehæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngohfakasha|ngohfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohfakshësha|ngohfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohfakrosha|ngohfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohfakmusha|ngohfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohfakyasha|ngohfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohfaknkshësha|gongohfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohfaknkrosha|gongohfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohfaknkmusha|gongohfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohfaknkyasha|gongohfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
